description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with a ribbed collar and graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoUnleash cricket fury with this grey cricket demon tee from adidas.
